english_text:
FIRE
EARTH
WATER
AIR
hot
dry
cold
wet
alt_text: Classical four-elements diagram: a green diamond with the four elements at its vertices (FIRE top, EARTH right, WATER bottom, AIR left) circumscribing an inner pink square whose corners are labeled with the four qualities (hot upper-left, dry upper-right, cold lower-right, wet lower-left). Pairs adjacent elements share a quality.
notes: Standard Aristotelian / classical four-elements diagram. Each element occupies a vertex and shares one of the four qualities (hot/cold/wet/dry) with each adjacent element.
